creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can't load '/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.36/auto/Unicode/LineBreak/LineBreak.so' for module Unicode::LineBreak: /usr/local/lib/libthai.so.0: version LIBTHAI_0.1 required by /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.36/auto/Unicode/LineBreak/LineBreak.so not defined at /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.36/XSLoader.pm line 94.
 at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.36/Unicode/LineBreak.pm line 63.


I don't know if it a problem with libthai or p5-unicode-linebreak, cc'ing otis
